title: Release quality dashboard for distributed teams
excerpt: Launched a release quality dashboard that consolidates test metrics, risk signals, and deployment readiness across distributed teams.
body: Built a modular dashboard that turned release observability into actionable QA intelligence. It surfaced regression coverage, stability trends, and critical failures so teams could prioritize fixes before launch.

title: Cross-browser validation suite for modern web apps
excerpt: Delivered a cross-browser validation suite that reduced browser-specific regressions and accelerated release cadence through CI automation.
body: Designed a flexible automation pipeline that executed smoke and regression tests across Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Safari, with detailed failure reports and visual checkpoints.

title: Release risk automation for continuous delivery
excerpt: Created a release risk automation layer that evaluates deployment readiness and prevents high-risk builds from progressing in the pipeline.
body: Automated acceptance checks, smoke gating, and risk scoring to block unstable builds and reduce release rollback frequency. The system integrated service health, test status, and coverage signals.

title: API contract coverage for enterprise services
excerpt: Built contract coverage tooling for enterprise APIs to catch integration drift and improve service reliability before production delivery.
body: Implemented contract-driven validation across backend services, with test assertions that verify schema, response shape, and error behavior as part of CI gating.
